title: GrowthAccelerator: evaluation - stakeholder views of the service
body: "Within the Business Growth Service, GrowthAccelerator provided coaching and advice to help small and medium-sized businesses to grow quickly and sustainably.  This formative evaluation examines the first 18 months of the service based on in-depth interviews with:   business users growth managers stakeholders investors    The Business Growth Service (GrowthAccelerator) closed in November 2015.   "
